taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Backend Software Engineer
core_skills: Backend development, Go, Python, Distributed systems, Service-oriented architecture
skill_match_scores: Backend development:1.0, Go:1.0, Python:1.0, Distributed systems:0.0, Service-oriented architecture:0.5
must_have_quals: 4+ years of backend development experience in Go or Python, 4+ years experience designing and building large-scale, resilient distributed systems using service-oriented or microservice architectures, 3+ years experience with cloud infrastructure, containerization, and deployment automation (AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, or similar), 3+ years experience with databases, queues, blob storage, and distributed systems fundamentals, You bring a systems design mindset, able to simplify complex workflows and deliver scalable, efficient solutions, You care deeply about performance, reliability, and security, and have a track record of building services that excel in all three, You thrive in a fast-paced environment, demonstrate creativity and sound judgment, and take ownership of problems end to end
preferred_quals: Bonus: you've worked with IoT devices, real-time streaming technologies, or multimedia formats such as H.264/H.265, FFmpeg, or similar pipelines
core_responsibilities: Design and evolve highly scalable, cloud-native services that power video and audio streaming for millions of devices, Architect and optimize distributed, real-time data pipelines that connect cameras, the cloud, and end users with low latency and high reliability, Build and operate a high-performance video transcoding and multiplexing service that is fault-tolerant, cost-efficient, and capable of scaling to massive workloads, Define and refine service-oriented architectures, APIs, and interfaces that enable streaming to scale seamlessly across our platform, Develop clean, reliable, and testable backend code that performs under heavy load and ensures a flawless customer experience, Collaborate cross-functionally with product, hardware, and infrastructure teams to deliver new video capabilities and experiences that raise the bar for the industry, Champion engineering excellence by driving performance, reliability, and best practices across the organization
job_summary: Verkada is transforming how organizations protect their people and places with an integrated, AI-powered platform. As a Backend Engineer (Video Streaming), you will design backend systems that scale seamlessly while delivering industry-leading reliability and security for video streaming services.
